verify error:num=10:certificate has expired
verify return:1
depth=0 CN = expired.badssl.com, OU = Test, O = BadSSL, L = San Francisco, ST = California, C = US
verify error:num=10:certificate has expired
verify return:1
---
Certificate chain

SSL handshake has read 2966 bytes and written 411 bytes
Verification error: certificate has expired
